title: Fix PR #366 CI regressions (storybook account context + npm ci flake)

comments.author: derek
comments.text: Investigating failing PR run 25890423127: Storybook tests fail with useAccount outside provider; dashboard unit job failed npm ci with transient ECONNRESET.

comments.author: derek
comments.text: Applied fix: Storybook webpack alias now maps '@/app/contexts/AccountContext' to dashboard/__mocks__/AccountContext.ts so useAccount resolves to mock in stories; CI npm install steps now include fetch retry flags to reduce transient ECONNRESET failures. Changes pushed in commit bbad79aa.

comments.author: derek
comments.text: Validated locally with Node 20 and full storybook test pipeline: npm run test-storybook:ci passes (89/89 suites, 700/700 tests). Root fix was restoring regex-based NormalModuleReplacement for AccountContext in .storybook/main.ts so all import forms are mocked.
